title: Financial Statements Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger financial statements foundations judgment so accounting work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Financial Statements Foundations is a leverage point inside accounting. It supports the broader goal of p&l, balance sheet, tax basics, and bookkeeping hygiene.
coreConcepts: Financial Statements Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good financial statements foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Financial Statements Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
